title: Ternary Heap — Parent and Children
description:
In a ternary min-heap (0-indexed), node i has:
- Parent at index (i-1)/3 (integer division)
- Children at 3i+1, 3i+2, 3i+3

Given an array of n integers and q queries. Each query is one of:
- P i : print the parent index of node i (or -1 if i=0)
- C i : print the indices of existing children of node i, space-separated (or 'none')
- M i : print the index of the minimum child of node i (or -1 if no children)
inputSpec: First line: n and q. Second line: n integers (the heap, 0-indexed). Then q query lines.
